function.name: pc_set_text
function.description: Set the text content of an input field on the PC using the OS accessibility API (AT-SPI2 on Linux, UI Automation on Windows). On Linux this directly replaces the field's text via EditableText interface. On Windows it focuses the element and sends the text. Use pc_ui_elements first to find an element with role Edit, then call this tool.

name.description: The element's name/label as returned by pc_ui_elements (role should be Edit or Entry).

window_title.description: The window_title as returned by pc_ui_elements. Leave empty to match any window.
